title: Giveable
description: Defines sets of items that can be used to trigger events when used on this entity. The item will also be taken and placed in the entity's inventory.

items.title: Items
items.description: The list of items that can be given to the entity to place in their inventory. Can be an array or a single item string.

on_give.title: Give Event
on_give.description: Event to fire when the correct item is given. Can be an object with event and target properties, or a simple event string.

cooldown.title: Cooldown
cooldown.description: An optional cool down in seconds to prevent spamming interactions.
